author: potuz
content: Mostly interested in EL devs thoughts about this problem treated today in ACDT, apologies for posting in this channel, but it seemed the most appropriate. https://www.potuz.net/posts/gloas-range-sync/

author: wolovim
content:
protocol calendar is pretty packed; as requested last ACDE, selected a date for a one-off **native account abstraction breakout: weds, april 22 @ 15:00 UTC**. i'll spend some time this week building an agenda. after this one-off call and interop, we can assess the need for an ongoing cadence.
